dataset_methodology.summary: Curated mixed-ecosystem FINOS public repository sample built from deterministic CycloneDX SBOM inputs with explicit direct/transitive dependency graph relationships.
limitations: This is a curated demo, not a complete FINOS organization scan.
The committed SBOM inputs model representative dependency graphs for selected FINOS repositories; they should not be interpreted as authoritative current SBOMs for those repositories.
Live scanner fidelity depends on support for each repository's package managers, lockfiles, and build metadata.
Container image/base-image findings are represented through OCI parent components and RPM child packages; image registry resolution is not performed for every build target.
